title: chrysanthemum canescens
intro: Chrysanthemum canescens, also known as White Chrysanthemum or Yin-Chen, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it a natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum canescens include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and promoting digestion, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing stress. Chrysanthemum canescens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and dried flowers, which can be used to promote overall well-being and prevent illnesses.
